booking.title: Book a Session
booking.subtitle: Choose your session type and pick a date
booking.description: Book a professional dog photography session in Bratislava — portraits, action shots, studio and outdoor sessions
booking.detail.faq.howMany: How many photos will I get?
booking.detail.faq.where: Where does the session take place?
booking.detail.faq.howLongAnswer: Session duration depends on the type — from 45 to 90 minutes.
booking.detail.faq.howManyAnswer: The number of edited photos depends on the session type — from 8 to 15 professionally edited images.
booking.detail.faq.whereAnswer: Studio sessions take place in our Bratislava studio. Outdoor sessions at an agreed location in the Bratislava area.

booking.confirmation.message: Thank you for your booking. We've sent a confirmation to your email.
booking.howItWorks.title: How it works
booking.howItWorks.step1.title: Choose your session
booking.howItWorks.step1.text: Browse our offerings and pick the session type that suits you best.
booking.howItWorks.step2.title: Book a date
booking.howItWorks.step2.text: Select an available date and time from our booking calendar.
booking.howItWorks.step3.title: Enjoy the experience
booking.howItWorks.step3.text: Bring your pup and we'll take care of the rest. Photos delivered within 7 days.
booking.about.title: Who's behind the lens
booking.about.text: I'm Adam — a Bratislava-based photographer who loves dogs and analog photography. Every session is a chance to capture your dog's unique character. I work with both 35mm film and digital to give you the best of both worlds.
booking.testimonials.title: What clients say
booking.testimonials.1.text: Adam captured Max's personality perfectly. The photos are amazing and the whole session was super relaxed!
booking.testimonials.1.author: Katarina M.
booking.testimonials.2.text: The best photos of our dog we've ever had. Professional approach and beautiful results.
booking.testimonials.2.author: Peter K.
booking.testimonials.3.text: The outdoor session was a great experience. Adam knew exactly how to work with our energetic pup.
booking.testimonials.3.author: Zuzana R.
